label: supported
passage: The vendor's SOC 2 Type II report was completed in March 2025 and covers security and availability.
claim: The vendor completed a SOC 2 Type II report in March 2025.

label: supported
passage: The Munich plant runs three production shifts on weekdays and a single shift on Saturdays.
claim: The Munich plant operates three shifts on weekdays.

label: supported
passage: Onboarding for new engineers takes four weeks, including two weeks of paired work.
claim: New engineer onboarding lasts four weeks.

label: supported
passage: The contract renews automatically each year unless either party gives ninety days' notice.
claim: The contract auto-renews annually absent ninety days' notice.

label: supported
passage: Payment terms are net 60 for all orders above 50,000 euros.
claim: Orders above 50,000 euros carry net-60 payment terms.

label: supported
passage: The data centre in Dublin reached 92 percent rack utilisation in the fourth quarter.
claim: Dublin data centre rack utilisation was 92 percent in the fourth quarter.

label: supported
passage: All field technicians must complete the updated electrical-safety certification before 1 June.
claim: Field technicians must finish the electrical-safety certification by 1 June.

label: supported
passage: The support team resolved 1,240 tickets last month, of which 87 percent met the service-level agreement.
claim: 87 percent of last month's resolved tickets met the service-level agreement.

label: supported
passage: The warehouse management system was migrated to the cloud in 2024.
claim: The warehouse management system moved to the cloud in 2024.

label: supported
passage: The board approved a 12 percent increase in the cybersecurity budget for the coming year.
claim: The cybersecurity budget will rise 12 percent next year.

label: supported
passage: Procurement consolidated from nine suppliers to four during the restructuring.
claim: Procurement reduced its supplier count from nine to four.

label: supported
passage: The mobile app supports English, German, and Japanese at launch.
claim: The mobile app launches with English, German, and Japanese support.

label: supported
passage: Each release goes through automated regression tests and a manual sign-off.
claim: Releases require both automated regression tests and a manual sign-off.

label: supported
passage: The supplier holds ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 certifications, both valid through 2026.
claim: The supplier's ISO 9001 certification is valid through 2026.

label: supported
passage: Staff may carry over a maximum of five unused vacation days into the next calendar year.
claim: Employees cannot bank more than a working week of leave beyond year-end.

label: supported
passage: The assembly line was idle for the entire second week of July following the coolant leak.
claim: Production halted for seven days in mid-July because of the coolant incident.

label: supported
passage: Revenue from the maintenance contracts now exceeds that from new hardware sales.
claim: The firm earns more from servicing than from selling new equipment.

label: supported
passage: No applicant without a valid commercial driving licence will be considered for the role.
claim: A commercial driving permit is a prerequisite for the position.

label: supported
passage: The previous platform was retired the moment the replacement passed user acceptance testing.
claim: The legacy system was decommissioned as soon as the new one cleared UAT.

label: supported
passage: Headcount in the analytics group doubled between 2023 and 2025.
claim: The analytics team grew to twice its size over two years.

label: supported
passage: Deliveries to the northern depots were rerouted through Hamburg after the bridge closure.
claim: The bridge shutdown forced northern-depot shipments via Hamburg.

label: supported
passage: Every external integration must pass a penetration test before it is allowed into production.
claim: Third-party connections are barred from going live until they survive a security probe.

label: supported
passage: The plant's emissions fell below the regulatory threshold for the first time in 2025.
claim: In 2025 the facility finally brought its emissions under the legal limit.

label: supported
passage: Roughly two thirds of the call volume now arrives outside business hours.
claim: A majority of calls now come in after hours.

label: supported
passage: The firm stopped accepting paper invoices at the start of the fiscal year.
claim: Hard-copy billing was discontinued when the new financial year began.

label: supported
passage: The director said the rollout would not proceed until the audit findings were closed.
claim: The audit issues must be resolved before the rollout can begin.

label: supported
passage: Sales in the eastern region slipped while every other territory grew.
claim: The east was the only region to decline.

label: supported
passage: Only the night crew is authorised to operate the high-bay cranes.
claim: Daytime staff are not permitted to run the high-bay cranes.

passage: The vendor completed a SOC 2 Type II audit for its US data centres.
claim: The vendor completed a SOC 2 Type II audit for all of its data centres.

passage: The Munich plant added a second production line in 2025.
claim: The Munich plant added two production lines in 2025.

passage: The roadmap targets migrating the billing system to the cloud by 2027.

passage: The Hamburg site passed its fire-safety inspection in April.
claim: The Munich site passed its fire-safety inspection in April.

claim: The company announced layoffs affecting 500 staff.

passage: Customer complaints about delivery times rose 30 percent, while complaints about product quality fell.

passage: Net-60 terms apply to strategic accounts.
claim: Net-60 terms apply to all accounts.

passage: The pilot in the Lyon office reduced processing time by 40 percent.

passage: The vendor claims its uptime exceeds 99.99 percent.

claim: The contract is worth 2 million euros per year.

claim: The firm uses a single sign-on provider for all applications.

passage: The parking structure will be repainted over the summer.
claim: Customer churn fell in the last quarter.

claim: The procurement policy requires three quotes for every purchase.

passage: The vendor's SOC 2 audit is scheduled but has not yet started.
claim: The vendor completed its SOC 2 audit.

passage: The Munich plant runs a single production shift on weekdays.
claim: The Munich plant runs three weekday shifts.

label: contradicted
passage: Onboarding was shortened from four weeks to two.
claim: Onboarding takes four weeks.

label: contradicted
passage: The contract does not renew automatically and must be re-signed each year.
claim: The contract renews automatically.

passage: Net-60 terms were discontinued; all orders are now net-30.
claim: Orders carry net-60 terms.

label: contradicted
passage: Dublin rack utilisation fell to 60 percent after the consolidation.
claim: Dublin rack utilisation is 92 percent.

label: contradicted
passage: The board rejected the proposed cybersecurity budget increase.
claim: The board approved the cybersecurity budget increase.

label: contradicted
passage: Procurement expanded from four suppliers to nine.
claim: Procurement consolidated from nine suppliers to four.

label: contradicted
passage: Japanese support was dropped from the launch scope.
claim: The app launches with Japanese support.

label: contradicted
passage: Manual sign-off was removed in favour of fully automated releases.
claim: Releases require a manual sign-off.

passage: The supplier's ISO 9001 certificate lapsed in 2024 and has not been renewed.
claim: The supplier's ISO 9001 certificate is valid through 2026.

passage: Emissions rose above the regulatory threshold again in 2025.
claim: Emissions fell below the regulatory threshold in 2025.

claim: The pilot reduced processing time.

passage: The migration to the cloud was cancelled and the system stays on-premises.
claim: The system was migrated to the cloud.

label: contradicted
passage: Paper invoices are still accepted alongside electronic ones.
claim: Paper invoices are no longer accepted.

label: contradicted
passage: The eastern region was the only territory to grow.
claim: The eastern region declined while the others grew.
